summary: Verification gate fixed — negative gate now targets the real ds-prefixed string, paired with positive gate; grep_preflight added to detect stale anchors fail-loud. — Full detail and corrected proposal in EXP-261-overview-hero-rework-v2.json. Resolution path: decider applies EXP-261 patches → curmudgeon spot-check → on green, close ISS-1572 as fixed-by-EXP-261.
fix_summary: EXP-261 FC1 verification_after replaces the tautological negative gate (grep class="scorecard sc-hero" expect 0 — already 0 before patch) with: (a) negative gate grep class="ds-scorecard ds-sc-hero" expect 0 (only true AFTER patch), (b) positive gate grep class="ds-thesis-hero" expect >= 1, (c) supplemental gate grep id="ds-thesis-statement" expect >= 1. Plus a grep_preflight field that fails loud if the find anchor is stale BEFORE the patch is attempted.
